# Pull Request Template

## 📋 Summary
Brief description of the changes made in this PR.

## 🔧 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Hardware-in-the-loop tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Simulation tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## 🛡️ Safety Considerations
- [ ] No safety-critical changes OR safety review completed
- [ ] Emergency shutdown procedures still functional
- [ ] RF compliance maintained
- [ ] Flight protocols updated if needed

## 📚 Documentation
- [ ] Code is self-documenting OR appropriate comments added
- [ ] User documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Safety documentation updated (if needed)

## 🔗 Related Issues
Closes #[issue number]

## 📸 Screenshots/Videos
(If applicable, add screenshots or videos demonstrating the changes)

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
